Yoga for Belly Fat, Digestion, Fat Burning, 30 Minute Yoga Routine for Beginners, At Home Wellness

Learn basic yoga for core strength- to target a flat belly and help improve digestion and digestive issues.  Great for after overeating a lot around the holidays!

Meera Hoffman teaches Yoga classes in Austin, Texas.  She also offer on-site wellness services such as yoga classes and chair massage, to corporations and private events in the Austin area.
